clk_begin.tooltip: Initialize the clock display module and bind TFT and U8g2 fonts

clk_sync_ntp.message0: NTP synchronization time zone %1 NTP1 %2 NTP2 %3 NTP3 %4
clk_sync_ntp.tooltip: Configure NTP time synchronization, the time zone is based on east longitude (China=8)

clk_show.tooltip: Refresh the clock interface (automatically redraw every minute, automatically read indoor temperature)

clk_force_redraw.tooltip: Force a complete redraw on next refresh

clk_read_temp.tooltip: Reading room temperature from NTC thermistor (10K@25C, Beta=3950)

clk_get_temp.tooltip: Get the last read indoor temperature (float)

clk_get_weekday.tooltip: Get the day of the week (0=Sunday 1=Monday ... 6=Saturday)

clk_draw_bg.message0: Draw the gradient background X %1 Y %2 Width %3 High %4
clk_draw_bg.tooltip: Draw the night sky gradient background (dark blue → black)

clk_draw_stars.tooltip: Draw random star points on the background

clk_show_temp.tooltip: Displays indoor temperature in the upper right corner of the screen
